heightfield_candidate.source_crs: EPSG:4326 source bounds; final Costa Rica working CRS not selected

target_unreal.intended_import_target: Unreal Landscape import-test level or replacement terrain layer
target_unreal.reason_disabled: Heightfield is not clipped, reprojected, conditioned, channel-burned, or guide-reviewed.

required_before_enable: Select Costa Rica working CRS and record WGS84/local/Unreal transforms.
Clip the DEM to a reviewed Pacuare corridor rather than the current broad planning bounds.
Void/artifact review the Copernicus DEM and compare against official SNIT/IDECORI or field-reviewed sources.
Hydrologically condition the river channel, bank breaklines, access edges, shelves, and tributary context.
Burn or otherwise encode the reviewed river centerline/channel so the Landscape import does not fight the validated water geometry.
Attach protected-area/access review and guide review before publishing detailed route packages.
Run editor import/export validation and capture before replacing the current procedural preview terrain.
notes: This contract exists so the Pacuare heightfield artifact has a clear Unreal-side target and gate.
It must not be treated as production terrain or solver geometry until the conditioning gates pass.
